summary: Reference Label Correction Feedback Loop feature fully tested. All 12 backend tests pass (1 skipped - no document with scores available). All 4 new label-corrections API endpoints are functional: /stats, /recent, /vendor/{id}, /document/{id}. The matching-debug endpoint correctly returns label_corrections and vendor_correction_patterns fields (both empty since this is a new feature with no corrections recorded yet). Frontend Matching Debug Panel verified with Score Breakdown showing 4 score components. Feedback Loop section correctly hidden when no corrections exist.
critical_code_review_comments: label_correction_service.py correctly implements ENTITY_TO_LABEL and COMPATIBLE_LABELS mappings
COMPATIBLE_LABELS for posted_sales_shipment includes {SHIPMENT, BOL, LOAD, PRO, REF} - so BOL→posted_sales_shipment does NOT create a correction (expected behavior)
label_correction_boost is component #9 in score_bc_match() and only contributes when corrections are learned
Feedback Loop section in frontend correctly only renders when corrections.length > 0 OR vendorPatterns?.has_patterns
All 4 new API endpoints return correct empty-state responses: stats={total_corrections:0, unique_vendors:0, top_corrections:[]}, recent=[], vendor={has_patterns:false}
seed_data_creation: None - used existing document 359c4112-ff06-4f1a-ba07-f761a2b26f8a (Tumalo Creek freight invoice)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Label Correction Feedback Loop feature is complete. Key endpoints: GET /api/label-corrections/stats (returns total_corrections, unique_vendors, top_corrections), GET /api/label-corrections/recent?limit=N, GET /api/label-corrections/vendor/{vendor_id} (returns has_patterns, patterns, label_remaps), GET /api/label-corrections/document/{doc_id}. The matching-debug endpoint now includes label_corrections and vendor_correction_patterns fields. Frontend MatchingDebugPanel shows 'Feedback Loop' section with 'Learning' badge ONLY when corrections exist. The label_correction_boost scoring component is highlighted in purple when non-zero. Collection starts empty - corrections are recorded automatically when resolution detects a label mismatch (e.g., PO label resolving to posted_sales_shipment). COMPATIBLE_LABELS prevent corrections for expected mappings like BOL→SHIPMENT.

GET /api/label-corrections/stats.evidence: Returns {total_corrections: 0, unique_vendors: 0, top_corrections: []} - correct empty state

GET /api/label-corrections/recent.evidence: Returns [] - correct empty list when no corrections recorded

GET /api/label-corrections/vendor/{vendo.evidence: Returns {has_patterns: false, vendor_id: 'TUMALOC'} for vendor without corrections

GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/matching-deb.evidence: Now includes label_corrections (array) and vendor_correction_patterns (object with has_patterns field)

POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/matching-de.evidence: Still works correctly - returns resolver_strategy=Freight_Invoice, match_outcome=likely_match for doc 359c4112

Frontend Matching Debug Panel.evidence: Panel shows Strategy, Outcome badge, Freight Carrier badge, Extraction table, Normalization Trace, Cache/API Results, Score Breakdown with visual bars

Frontend Feedback Loop section.evidence: Section correctly hidden when no corrections exist (corrections.length === 0 && !vendorPatterns?.has_patterns)

Frontend Learning badge.evidence: Badge only appears when hasLearningSignals is true - correctly hidden in test since no corrections

Backend label_correction_boost component.evidence: Score breakdown shows components: exact_reference_match (40%), entity_type_alignment (10%), candidate_confidence (10%), freight_vendor_boost (15%). label_correction_boost would appear when non-zero

Backend COMPATIBLE_LABELS validation.evidence: Service code correctly defines COMPATIBLE_LABELS[posted_sales_shipment] = {SHIPMENT, BOL, LOAD, PRO, REF}

Backend auto_resolution integration.evidence: auto_resolution_service.py includes detect_and_record call after successful resolution (lines 312-337)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live - label_corrections collection starts empty as expected for new feature
